description: Local Fire While True is a ProtoFlux node that will check Condition (bool) is true on the local machine rather on a specific user. Then the node will fire every game tick, sending impulses from OnUpdate (Call) on that specific user.

fields.Condition: The value to check on the local client on if it is true.
fields.OnUpdate: Will send an impulse very game tick while Condition (bool) is true on the local client. Will send the impulses from the local client.
